description.value:
Prerequisite: Strong, Agile, or Tough Hero, or Strong, Agile, or Tough Hero Training, Level 4+, Not a Rogue

You have decided to take up some unsavory pastimes and have found a place for yourself in the underworld.

  • Gain one Skill proficiency from: Acrobatics, Deception, Sleight of Hand, Stealth, and Streetwise.

  • Once per turn, when you hit a target with an Attack, and you had Advantage on the Attack Roll, you can deal 1d6 Bonus damage.

  • As a Bonus Action, you can make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check, use the Search action, use the Hide action, or use the Object Interaction action.
